why_not_flex: Flex is parser/help-clean, but prior real execution evidence showed Unsupported service_tier: flex before worker action.
why_not_null: Null was rejected by config parsing as an unknown service_tier variant.
why_not_ignore_user_config: Ignoring user config previously bypassed trusted-project and Windows sandbox behavior and led to effective read-only worker execution.
why_not_remove_config_field_now: A parser/help-clean override is available, and this gate did not approve config mutation.
